description_long: This stuffed toy is modeled after an animatronic bear, featuring a golden-yellow, textured surface that mimics worn fabric. The bear has a large, rounded head with a black top hat, a bow tie, and two black buttons on its chest, giving it a formal appearance. Its right ear is partially missing, and its left eye is a red, glowing orb, while the right eye socket is empty with exposed wires hanging out. The limbs and joints are segmented, with visible seams and some exposed wiring, suggesting a mechanical or robotic interior. The toy's mouth is wide open, showing a row of white teeth, and there are patches of damage and missing fur, especially on the arms and legs. The overall look is both playful and slightly eerie, with colorful wires protruding from the limbs and head, adding to its animatronic character.
description: A golden-yellow animatronic bear stuffed toy with a black top hat, bow tie, segmented limbs, and exposed wires, featuring a damaged and worn appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bear's face with one glowing red eye, missing right ear, black top hat, bow tie, and exposed wires from the right eye socket and limbs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the bear's protruding snout, segmented arm and leg joints, and colorful wires emerging from the head and lower leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, body, and limbs, with the top hat and missing right ear visible, and no facial features present.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the bear's wide mouth, segmented joints, and additional exposed wiring on the lower leg and head.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is a wide, open-mouthed smile with one glowing red eye and an empty eye socket, giving a slightly unsettling and eerie appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with arms slightly bent at the elbows and legs straight, head facing forward.
